description: Synthetic corpus with deliberately injected problems for scoring detectors and entity resolution. Every label references a real entity in the corpus.

stale_prs.note: Open since 2026-05-01 (~44 days vs as_of) with no submitted review.

flaky_tests.note: Fails on run attempt 1 and passes on attempt 2 for the same commit SHA.

deadline_drifts.note: Due date moved three times across the issue history.

bus_factors.note: auth/tokens.py is touched only by dave across three commits.
